sources.title: Two Against The World 1936 Bogart
sources.description: Humphrey Bogart plays an unscrupulous radio show producer.

metadata.Plot: Martha Carstairs was charged with murder twenty years earlier. Now, as her daughter Edith is about to be married to Malcolm Sims Jr., son of a wealthy industrialist, a sensationalistic radio station revives interest in the case, leading to the suicide of Martha and her husband. Opposing the station's policy is Sherry Scott, supported by his secretary Alma Ross, "two against the world."
metadata.Actors: Humphrey Bogart, Beverly Roberts, Linda Perry
